requirement_topic.en: CRC / MinTIC Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: CRC / MinTIC强制型式认证——无线电及电信终端设备型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: CRC / MinTIC強制型式認證——無線電及電信終端設備型號核准

summary.en: All radio-frequency-emitting and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, cellular modules, and other intentional radiators — must obtain a CRC homologación certificate (mandatory type approval) issued under Ley 1341 de 2009 (Ley de TIC) and CRC regulations before import or sale in Colombia. The Comisión de Regulación de Comunicaciones (CRC) administers homologation procedures under the MinTIC framework; the Agencia Nacional del Espectro (ANE) enforces spectrum compliance. Upon approval, CRC assigns a unique homologation number that must appear on the Spanish-language product label. Devices sold, imported, or commercially distributed without a valid CRC homologation certificate are subject to customs detention and administrative penalties under the SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) consumer-protection regime. FCC (US), CE (EU), SRRC (China), and CCC (China) approvals are not recognised by CRC and do not substitute for Colombian homologación.
summary.zh: 所有射频发射及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee、蜂窝模块及其他有意辐射体——在进口或于哥伦比亚销售前，必须依据《2009年第1341号技术信息通信法》（Ley de TIC）及CRC法规取得CRC型式认证证书（强制型号核准）。通信监管委员会（CRC）在MinTIC框架下负责管理认证程序；国家频谱局（ANE）负责频谱合规执法。获批后，CRC分配唯一认证编号，须标注于西班牙语产品标签上。未持有效CRC型式认证证书进行销售、进口或商业分销的设备，将面临海关扣押及工业商业监督局（SIC）消费者保护制度下的行政处罚。FCC（美国）、CE（欧盟）、SRRC（中国）及CCC（中国）核准不被CRC承认，不得替代哥伦比亚型式认证。
summary.zht: 所有射頻發射及電信終端設備——包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee、蜂巢模組及其他有意輻射體——在進口或於哥倫比亞銷售前，必須依據《2009年第1341號技術資訊通信法》（Ley de TIC）及CRC法規取得CRC型式認證證書（強制型號核准）。通信監管委員會（CRC）在MinTIC框架下負責管理認證程序；國家頻譜局（ANE）負責頻譜合規執法。獲批後，CRC分配唯一認證編號，須標注於西班牙語產品標籤上。未持有效CRC型式認證證書進行銷售、進口或商業分銷的裝置，將面臨海關扣押及工業商業監督局（SIC）消費者保護制度下的行政處罰。FCC（美國）、CE（歐盟）、SRRC（中國）及CCC（中國）核准不被CRC承認，不得替代哥倫比亞型式認證。

standards_or_laws: Ley 1341 de 2009 (Ley de TIC) — enabling legislation for CRC homologation of radio and telecom equipment in Colombia
CRC Resoluciones on homologación — CRC resolutions governing type-approval procedures, technical requirements, and labelling
ANE — Agencia Nacional del Espectro spectrum enforcement (2.4 GHz / 5 GHz band plan aligned with ITU Region 2 / FCC)
SIC — Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio consumer-protection enforcement for non-compliant devices

summary.en: In China, radio transmitters including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, now NRA under MIIT) type approval before import or sale. Terminal equipment connecting to public networks may also require a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Certain radio and electrical products require CCC (China Compulsory Certification). These approvals are based on GB radio standards and Chinese frequency allocations. None of these Chinese approvals are recognised by CRC; a completely separate Colombian homologación is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，包括Wi-Fi和蓝牙模块在内的无线电发射设备，须在进口或销售前经工业和信息化部（MIIT）管理的国家无线电管理局（原SRRC，现NRA）型号核准。接入公众网络的终端设备还可能需要MIIT进网许可证（NAL）。部分无线电和电气产品须取得CCC（中国强制认证）。上述核准基于GB无线电标准和中国频率划分，均不被CRC承认；须单独完成哥伦比亚型式认证程序。
summary.zht: 在中國，包括Wi-Fi和藍牙模組在內的無線電發射裝置，須在進口或銷售前經工業和信息化部（MIIT）管理的國家無線電管理局（原SRRC，現NRA）型號核准。接入公眾網絡的終端設備還可能需要MIIT進網許可證（NAL）。部分無線電和電氣產品須取得CCC（中國強制認證）。上述核准基於GB無線電標準和中國頻率劃分，均不被CRC承認；須單獨完成哥倫比亞型式認證程序。

standards_or_laws: SRRC/NRA Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio transmitter approval in China under MIIT
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — mandatory for terminal equipment connecting to public networks in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for certain in-scope radio and electrical products sold in China
GB 15629.11 and related WLAN/radio technical standards — China-specific radio test standards

gap.en: Chinese SRRC/NRA type approval, MIIT NAL, and CCC certification are not recognised by CRC and do not satisfy Colombian homologación requirements. A separate CRC homologation certificate must be obtained before the product may be imported or sold in Colombia. Key compliance actions include: engaging a Colombia-registered importer or authorised representative to apply; testing against CRC and ANE technical requirements; confirming 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz channel and power parameters under the ANE/CRC band plan; obtaining the CRC certificate and homologation number; applying the CRC-compliant Spanish-language label with the homologation number; and completing RUT importer registration with DIAN. There is no mutual recognition or equivalence pathway between CRC and FCC, CE, or CCC frameworks.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC/NRA型号核准、MIIT进网许可证和CCC认证不被CRC承认，不满足哥伦比亚型式认证要求。在哥伦比亚进口或销售产品前，须另行取得CRC型式认证证书。主要合规行动包括：委托哥伦比亚注册进口商或授权代表申请；依据CRC和ANE技术要求进行检测；确认ANE/CRC频段规划下2.4 GHz和5 GHz信道及功率参数；取得CRC证书及认证编号；加贴含认证编号的CRC合规西班牙语标签；以及向DIAN完成RUT进口商登记。CRC与FCC、CE或CCC体系之间无相互认可或等效路径。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC/NRA型號核准、MIIT進網許可證和CCC認證不被CRC承認，不滿足哥倫比亞型式認證要求。在哥倫比亞進口或銷售產品前，須另行取得CRC型式認證證書。主要合規行動包括：委託哥倫比亞註冊進口商或授權代表申請；依據CRC和ANE技術要求進行檢測；確認ANE/CRC頻段規劃下2.4 GHz和5 GHz信道及功率參數；取得CRC證書及認證編號；加貼含認證編號的CRC合規西班牙語標籤；以及向DIAN完成RUT進口商登記。CRC與FCC、CE或CCC體系之間無相互認可或等效路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CRC homologación required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Colombia under Ley 1341 de 2009; non-compliant devices subject to customs detention and SIC penalties
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC/NRA type approval required for radio transmitters; MIIT NAL required for terminal equipment connecting to public networks in China

source.publisher: CRC — Comisión de Regulación de Comunicaciones (Colombia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia requires CRC mandatory homologación for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import or sale under Ley 1341 de 2009. Chinese SRRC, CCC, FCC, and CE approvals are not recognised. The homologation number must appear on a Spanish-language label. Verify current CRC resolutions, ANE band-plan parameters, and the in-country registration process with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚依据《2009年第1341号法》要求所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前取得CRC强制型式认证。中国SRRC、CCC、FCC和CE核准均不被承认。认证编号须标注于西班牙语标签上。请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验现行CRC决议、ANE频段规划参数及境内登记程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞依據《2009年第1341號法》要求所有無線電及電信終端設備在進口或銷售前取得CRC強制型式認證。中國SRRC、CCC、FCC和CE核准均不被承認。認證編號須標注於西班牙語標籤上。請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗現行CRC決議、ANE頻段規劃參數及境內登記程序。
